param_comments.auto_adjust_session_times: When true, automatically selects DST or standard session times based on current date.
param_comments.magnitude_similarity_threshold: Minimum similarity ratio (0-1) between price changes to be considered part of the same pattern.
param_comments.min_pattern_occurrences: Minimum number of times a pattern must occur to be considered valid. Increase for higher confidence, decrease to catch rare patterns.
param_comments.peak_prominence: Minimum prominence for peak detection. Higher values detect only the most significant peaks and troughs.
param_comments.price_impact_threshold: Minimum percentage price change to be considered significant (0.2 = 0.2%). Adjust based on market volatility.
param_comments.price_smooth_span: Span parameter for exponential smoothing of prices. Higher values = more smoothing, less noise.
param_comments.random_seed: Random seed for reproducible visualizations in demonstration charts.
param_comments.session_times: Trading session definitions for both DST (summer) and standard time (winter) periods.
param_comments.significance_threshold: P-value threshold (0.05 = 95% confidence). Lower values require stronger statistical evidence.
param_comments.strong_correlation_threshold: Correlation coefficient threshold (0-1) for identifying strong relationships between different time periods.
param_comments.time_shift_cluster_eps: DBSCAN clustering distance parameter in minutes. Controls how close time points must be to form a cluster.
param_comments.time_shift_cluster_min_samples: Minimum samples needed for DBSCAN to form a cluster. Higher values require more evidence.
param_comments.time_shift_tolerance: Maximum time difference in minutes to consider events as the same pattern shifting in time.
param_comments.time_window: Time window in minutes for grouping events. Smaller values identify more precise patterns, larger values group more events together.
param_comments.timezone: Timezone used for analysis. Should match the primary market being analyzed.
param_comments.volume_impact_threshold: Volume ratio compared to average to be considered significant (1.5 = 50% above average).
